column4: A discount provided to senior citizens (usually individuals aged 60 or above) to help reduce the financial burden of utility payments. This discount reflects social support for retired individuals on fixed incomes.
A discount offered to households with three or more children to help them manage higher utility usage. This privilege supports families with larger household needs.

A special discount provided to honor and support veterans who have served in the military. This privilege recognizes their contributions and sacrifices by making essential utility services more affordable. The program reflects gratitude and commitment to improving the quality of life for veterans and their families.
Designed for families or individuals with low incomes, this discount aims to ensure essential services remain affordable. It supports social equity and accessibility.
